metadata.title: Multi-Repo Context Hub
metadata.description: Curated sources for AGENTS.md guidance, context engineering, repo instruction surfaces, and documentation quality patterns used by the multi-repo context hub skill.

context_and_memory.name: AGENTS.md Specification
context_and_memory.description: Portable repo instruction standard for agents.

context_and_memory.name: Anthropic: Effective Context Engineering for AI Agents
context_and_memory.description: Primary guide for context engineering, context rot, just-in-time context, compaction, note-taking, and multi-agent isolation patterns.

context_and_memory.name: OpenAI: Harness engineering: leveraging Codex in an agent-first world
context_and_memory.description: Primary OpenAI guidance for repository knowledge as the system of record, short AGENTS.md maps, checked-in plans, and doc-gardening loops.

context_and_memory.name: LangChain: Context engineering in agents
context_and_memory.description: Agent context model covering model context, tool context, lifecycle context, state, and long-term store boundaries.

context_and_memory.name: Claude Code Memory
context_and_memory.description: Official project memory guidance for CLAUDE.md and scoped memory.

platform_context_surfaces.name: OpenAI Codex AGENTS.md Guide
platform_context_surfaces.description: Current OpenAI guidance for AGENTS.md behavior.

platform_context_surfaces.name: GitHub Copilot Repository Instructions
platform_context_surfaces.description: Repository and path-specific instruction surfaces for Copilot.

platform_context_surfaces.name: GitHub Copilot Custom Agents
platform_context_surfaces.description: Custom agent surface for GitHub-native workflows.

platform_context_surfaces.name: VS Code Custom Instructions
platform_context_surfaces.description: Instruction layering and scope behavior in VS Code AI workflows.

knowledge_graph_methodology.name: Understand-Anything: Multi-Agent Knowledge Graph Pipeline
knowledge_graph_methodology.description: 7-phase multi-agent pipeline (Pre-flight → Scan → Analyze → Assemble → Architecture → Tour → Review → Save) using tree-sitter AST and LLM semantic enrichment to build JSON knowledge graphs from codebases. Key adoptable patterns: two-pass analysis, graph-as-artifact, 7-check automated validation, BFS traversal for focused context.

knowledge_graph_methodology.name: Microsoft GraphRAG
knowledge_graph_methodology.description: Official GraphRAG documentation for indexing, query modes, local/global search, and graph-backed corpus retrieval patterns.

knowledge_graph_methodology.name: Use Graph When It Needs: Efficiently and Adaptively Integrating Retrieval-Augmented Generation with Graphs
knowledge_graph_methodology.description: February 2026 paper documenting the graph-overuse trap and adaptive routing between dense retrieval and graph-based retrieval.

docs_and_quality.name: JSON Schema
docs_and_quality.description: Schema standard for normalized profile contracts.
